dialog: Pssst... Neura... Look how good I am.
Whoa! Who are you? And why is your curve so... wiggly?
I memorized all the points. Every single one. My accuracy on the training set is... 100%. Impressive, right?
100%? That sounds amazing! But... why does your curve look so crazy?
Keep training. One more epoch. One more. The curve will become perfect. It will touch every point. You'll be infallible... at least on this data.
I don't know... Something feels wrong about this...
